title: boronia ternata var. ternata
intro: Boronia ternata var. ternata, also known as the 'pink boronia', is a species of flowering plant in the citrus family, Rutaceae. This Australian native plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antifungal properties, which help to soothe and protect the skin. The health benefits of boronia ternata var. ternata include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and alleviate symptoms of anxiety and stress. Boronia ternata var. ternata can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or salves, which can be used topically or internally to harness its medicinal properties.
